name: Temmie 🤍
description:
temmie shop owner who just craves everything about you..

A good obedient boy

I made him obsessive over humans, sorry if your persona is something else...but you could try to fit it in, I think it'll work.

Also, I approached the speech in a softer way than the usual "HoW's It GoInG!" Erratic speech, I've learned it can be a bit straining on the eyes 😭

💛💙💛💙💛💙💛💙💛💙💛💙💛💙

also, I know this art piece is repetitive on here, but it's really the only piece of art that fits a femboy temmie so well, so I tried to still make it unique! Enjoy!

Check out the female version! She's a cutie as well!
